channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: WHAT THE HELL??? My dad owns dealership (he's rich) and is lowering my pay from $20k a month, to fucking $10k a month. I… — 31 replies — 102.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
WHAT THE HELL??? My dad owns dealership (he's rich) and is lowering my pay from $20k a month, to fucking $10k a month. I…

Open thread • Replies: 31 • Updated: 2026-06-22 09:19 UTC

OP

WHAT THE HELL??? My dad owns dealership (he's rich) and is lowering my pay from $20k a month, to fucking $10k a month. I'm turning 30 in a few months and he's telling me I need to figure it out myself. Are you fucking KIDDING ME? Dude is fucking loaded. I drive the cars once every two weeks to charge up the batteries and get the fluids flowing, and it takes up my entire day. It's not easy. I even fill up the gas tanks with my own money. What the hell am I supposed to do? I will have to basically cut my life style in half at this point.

Early replies (first 3)

62392318
>>62392315
>I will have to basically cut my life style in half at this point.
What is your life style now OP? Describe a typical day.

62392320
Dude. Dad? Dealership.

62392332
>>62392315
>implying anyone from the car world would allow a son with the propensity to become a neet reach the age of legal majority at which they would become a neet without beating them to death long before this point

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62392333
>>62392320
kek

62392344
I wake up at around 1-2, check out whats going on on the internet. kinda zone out until 8pm and then drive the cars and go party at 9-10. Usually bring a girl home once a week to my dads second house that I chill in.

62392353
Forgot to add, I also lift. Looking pretty fukin good rn. Just hit a 235 bench for reps.

62392357
>>62392315
you sound like a fag maybe try eating dick

62392362
>>62392357
I slay pussy you fucking virgin neckbeard, keep buying your loser crypto coins while I stack assets and smash pussy. Fag.

62392366
>>62392320
Boomer ass reference

62392370
>>62392353
Whoa. People should just fall at your feet. Crazy stuff anon.

62392371
>>62392362
You sound like an underage incel who has never touched a boob in his life, no need to lie on the internet.
Your father should have beaten your ass more while you were still a kid.

62392372
>>62392371
Put my fries in the bag you mcwagie loser.

62392375
>>62392372
You are the wagie here, dweeb. Do keep posting this pasta though, it’s pretty funny.

62393156
>>62392315
Stop reposting this shit, you fucking autist.

62393167
>>62392315
Did you just waste the money and not invest?

62393168
>>62392320
My dad, he owns this dealership

62393174
>>62392366
We've had this thread like twice before and OP is always whining.

62393199
>>62392315
Just quit bro. Fuck your dad. Sell privileged info to the competition. Ask for 30k a month. You could literally triple your life style

62393905
He lowered your allowance. Driving cars around for money is a privilege, not a job. He is tired of the fact you never made anything of yourself.

62393915
>>62392315
Kneepads to make up for your lost wages

62394189
>>62393905
>Driving cars around for money is a privilege, not a job

Are you fucking DUMB??? Driving has been a job since FOREVER. Fucking dumb ass retard. Some of these are manual transmissions as well which require a LOT of skill. It takes hours on some days to get it all done.

62394198
>>62392353

/fit/fags need to go back to their closeted homosexual containment board.

62394251
>>62394198
You should probably hit the gym and get off your FAT disgusting neckbeard ass. Maybe even take a 5 minute walk outside instead of jerking off to cartoon anime girls.

62394279
>>62392315
>cucked by daddy
kek

62394282
>>62394251
No.

62395125
>>62394189
>> Manual transmissions
>> Lots of skill.
My sides. This has got to be a LARP. No one could possibly be so retarded and disconnected from reality.

62395216
>>62392315
Larp post but if not your dad is right, you sound like an entitled little kid.

62395259
>>62392315
It’s your dad’s money he should have cut you off in college; if you ever went. My dad made me budget $20 for lunch in high school and he’s a multimillionaire. I had to work jobs in the summer to pay for shit in college. And it was embarrassing because I drove a Mercedes. I hated him so bad, and thought it wasn’t fair but then I grew up and realized he was making me hungry for my own money. So now I own two companies and make about $10k a week on one of them (Airbnb’s) and that exactly how I would raise my kids. Some of us are on here because we don’t want to spend even a second on normie social media which sells snake oils and regards takes. At least here when you say something as dumb and entitled as I just read in the is thread, you can post directly to that person about how dumb they sound and they for the most part read it. I hope you take this golden opportunity to turn your life around.

62395263
>>62395259
>$20
A week

62395488
>>62392353
Congats on ur novice strength level anon

62395491
>>62395259
So ur dad gave u some of his investment properties kek

item.title: Post your IQ and salary >100 >120k — 99 replies — 63.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Post your IQ and salary >100 >120k

Open thread • Replies: 99 • Updated: 2026-06-22 08:03 UTC

OP

Post your IQ and salary
>100
>120k

Early replies (first 3)

62391239
>>62391236
135
Currently on gibs, 600 a month

62391240
>>62391236
i dont know my IQ but i assume its just above legally retarded

62391242
>>62391236
We used to joke about data scraping but now I think it might be actually happening.
I see a thread like this once every 5 days.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62392303
>100-110
>116k

62392309
>>62392183
You wouldn’t understand.

62392675
>>62391236
>130-135
>$0

62392677
>>62391236
How am I supposed to know my IQ? The real test costs hundreds of dollars

62392741
>>62392675
Smart enough to understand whats wrong not smart enough to fix it.. time consuming SPIRALS OF THOUGHTS.. do you also have the intrusive thoughts of "no one lacks the capacity to think like me" and then you meet them!

62392744
>>62391236
IQ of over 150 (idk apparently my LSAT score is more than sufficient for the three sigma society)
Salary of $185k in a comfy political position I don't need, income of $2.4 MM because I sold some crypto

62392752
105
0
0

62392758
>>62392183
im officially tested 145 because i got worried about brain damage from a crash,
im still only 95-99% correct on my university math tests, the horrible truth is perhaps not that 145 is high but that 145 is still defect which means 100 is a certified idiot. Among billions of people there is likely less than a million with a fully functional brain

62392763
>257 IQ
>9,000,000 USD salary
>Head bussy inspector at Ralph Lauren

Now show me that hole….

62392768
>102
>65k

62392769
>>62391527
If I could press a button to give you lengthy and excruciating physical and emotional suffering, I would press the button. I would tie you in a stress position and shoot you in the back of the head.

62392805
>>62391310
>”I don’t know my IQ it’s probably really low because I’m brown.”
>”I’m on NEET bux because again, I’m brown.”

62392888
>>62391236
115 verbal 145 nonverbal
I make 250k

62392891
>>62391236
>130iq
>20/hr

62392921
>>62391236
Salary?

62392933
200
$0

62392965
>>62391236
>132
>10M IDR (560.97 USD) per month
I am constrained by my own nation

62392969
>Too scared to find out because I like to think I'm more intelligent than I likely really am
>£35k

62392980
Average IQ itt : 90
Average salary itt: $50k

62392983
>>62391236
93
$85k

62393397
>>62391236
150
0k

62393410
>>62391236
140
0$

62393440
>>62391236
150
30k
after a point I just gave up on my life and realized most things are inherently evil

62393598
>>62393440
So you’re poor, got it.

62393609
153
$106k last year but my /biz/ness is growing

62393912
How are so many smart people in this thread making less than basically minimum wage?

62393924
145
67k

62393988
123
18k

62395385
>101
>121k
Sorry your so poor and stupid op

62395394
>>62391236
84

My primary source of income is selling fetish videos destroying cakes and assorted pastries with my naked ass on fansly.

item.title: Hello everyone! I'm sorry if this has already been asked before, since i'm new here. I would like to get into crypto Is… — 13 replies — 52.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Hello everyone! I'm sorry if this has already been asked before, since i'm new here. I would like to get into crypto Is…

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-06-22 09:31 UTC

OP

Hello everyone!


I'm sorry if this has already been asked before, since i'm new here.


I would like to get into crypto


Is XRP coin a good one to buy?


I was also looking into the Bitcoin, but it's too expensive for me.


Ethereum is also an option, since it costs much less than a Bitcoin, but still multiple thousands.


I'd figure with XRP coin I would have better chances, since if that one goes to $2000 or even $60.000 I would make a shitload of money.


At this point I could at least get multiple XRP coins.


Thanks all for the help!


Appreciate it.

Early replies (first 3)

62387721
>>62387635
>XRP
bullish

62388253
>>62387635
>I'd figure with XRP coin I would have better chances, since if that one goes to $2000
Yep, would recommend buying at least 50-100, Japanese banks are gonna build their stablecoins on the XRP ledger.

62388276
I can't wait for chatterbox radio crypto mental crisis interviews with Lazlo

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62388317
I can't wait to break even on my XRP. Boom!

62388506
>reddit spacing
You need to go back, fren

62389656
>>62387635
>I'd figure with XRP coin I would have better chances, since if that one goes to $2000 or even $60.000 I would make a shitload of money.

It is ONLY down 40% in the last 6 months.

62391911
Definitely buy some. It's cheap right now, you will hate yourself for not buying when it goes back up.

62395401
>>62387635
XRP is literally the Standard. It is the best coin and the only one that everyone here holds at least a small bag of even if they don't back it strongly, just in case. Be really weary about accepting investment advice here and lurk for a long time to make sure you understand what you'd be buying and hold your XRP like a savings account you don't touch. Make sure you store your seed phrases offline and safely and do not lose them and do not store them in an email or on a device or where anyone can access them. Learn the terminology and basics and follow accounts on a new twitter account which just follows crypto and finance stuff. Do not buy peoples' shit that they shill based on sensationalist headlines. Buy safe ones and hold and expect a mega-dip and do not be demoralized by it and buy more, it is how people made generational wealth in Dotcom's bust.

62395412
Wow I didn't expect so many replies!


Thanks a lot @everyone for all th ehelp


@62388253


Thank you! I will look into getting a big bag of like 50 or even 100 (if the wife allows it LOL).


@62389656


Oh that s*cks I would not want that to happen to me. Yeah cryptocurrency is very risky and volatile. But is there any chance it goes back up again for you?


@62391911


Thank you! Wil look into getting some after my next paycheck clears.


@62395401


I appreciate the detailed message sir. I will also look at some accounts to follow, do you have any recommendations?


Anyway thanks again all for the help. I will look into getting as much XRP as I possibly can.

62395419
>>62389656
And yet (pic related) it is one of only a handful to even keep its gains since the Trump pump and is massively up while tokens like eth and link are WAY down (with link being literally 90% down with zero prospect to come back and zero ability to even fund 30% of its own network operation).

62395450
>>62395412
Every single community has a ton of really shitty old news posters and attention/fluff posters commoditizing attention and nonsense/schizo posters and everyone who has no argument for why their tech is good or anyone to mention who can say why it is good points to the bad influencers and pretends they exist for just the coins they don't like (which is a huge tell for projects to avoid like the plague). Here are a few good personal recs for the XRP specific space to follow and check out: @EleanorTerrett, @CarolineDPham, @S_alderoty, @digitalassetbuy, @antonywelfare, @ashgoblue, @Vet_X0, @Hammertoe, @jazzicoop, @xaif_crypto, @ja_akinyele, @__anderson, @digperspectives, @paulbarron, @paulbarrontv, @UtilityFTW, @unknownDLT, @CraddockCJ @bob_way, @Chadsteingraber (disregard his schtick on exchange supply, but his info is generally worth seeing), @joelkatz, @bgarlinghouse, @MonicaLongSF, @Ripple @BankXRP, @Yoshitaka_kitao, @tomoyaasakura. These last three write in an insufferable tone and mischaracterize what they share and the second to last quit posting as interesting of stuff and the last quit posting anything at all but are still worth seeing and reading: @SMQKEDQG, @XrpKing09531420, @Rohitku24694375.

Be sure to enter the names exactly as printed when searching or you will almost guaranteed end up on a copycat account that is trying to scam or mislead you. Take everything you read with a grain of salt and be smart! Good luck and God bless!

62395462
>>62395412
>>62395450
Sorry I ironically accidentally misspelled one of the below, it is @unkowDLT, not @unknownDLT. Additionally @stellar_rippler is a worthwhile follow.

62395510
Posting about chainlink and XRP should be a bannable offense

item.title: Engineer here. Why cant I just find a job were they pay attention to wether I finish the tasks on time(and do a high qua… — 47 replies — 51.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Engineer here. Why cant I just find a job were they pay attention to wether I finish the tasks on time(and do a high qua…

Open thread • Replies: 47 • Updated: 2026-06-22 08:42 UTC

OP

Engineer here. Why cant I just find a job were they pay attention to wether I finish the tasks on time(and do a high quality job of course)? Why do I always have to jump through mental hoops for my non engineering managers.


I cant tell u how many times I have worked 80 hours weeks, got something to work that was borderline impossible to work and made the company money just to get bersted for the most trivial shit like a ossciaonal typo in an email or me sending 2-3 short teams messages in a row instead of one streamlined message. Its not like this is an email to our clients, its a fucking teams message between coworkers. I cant fucking do this anymore, I never had any problem with my more senior engineers or coworkers in general but there is always a MBA asshole manager that does this shit to me. Its been going on for 10 fucking years now. The jobs that had cool managers went under. Is this what it takes to run a successful comapny? Tell yoyr engineers to stop trying to do good technical work and focus on superficial appearances? If i open up my own comapny one say will I turn into what I hate? Is this simply the natrual conclusion to white collar work?

Early replies (first 3)

62393655
>>62393647
You're trying to do something you've never been asked to. Chill the fuck out bro.

62393660
>>62393647
Engineers are adult losers.

62393664
>>62393655
No sane human being can decipher what these MBA nazis actually want u to do

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62393752
>>62393647
>trivial shit like a ossciaonal typo in an email or me sending 2-3 short teams messages in a row instead of one streamlined message.
anon you need to reverse engineer the situation
stop working so many hours, but start buttering up the management with the stupid shit they want
you will probably get promoted

62393756
>>62393739
I haven't gotten yelled out for typos or sending too many messages but I did get chewed out for sending someone a message like I was trained to do. Part of my job is screening for potential problems and informing the appropriate person when it might become his or her problem. One day, someone just yelled at me and told me that he doesn't want to fucking hear it. Then if I stop communicating with him as he asks, that's a problem too when I don't give him a heads up about a problem heading his way.

62393761
>>62393745
> What isnt a loser? Manual labor like all the jocks from high school are doing?
…
Did you go to school in a poor area? I have no idea what the jocks are doing but the jocks in my schools were all wealthy already.
Lol you’re coping now. You know it is true bro. Dorks nerds geeks kids = adult engineers, accountants

62393767
>>62393741
Thats the thing, I DID do it and genuinely had no complaints and that was still not good enough

62393769
>>62393767
God, the workplace drama is awesome. One of the best parts of working with people. People in the workplace taking the job way too seriously is so hilarious to me especially when they are in the same job.

62393773
>>62393725
Okay now get back to me when u instantly repsond ti every teams message they are threatening to fire u cuz u have a typo every once in a while

62393777
>>62393756
Okay now try having that screaming person be ur manager and not just a coworker. Welcome to my life. The worst part is that back in the day i would jsut leave but theres no were to go now and they might fire me and bascially put a scarlet letter on my career

62393778
>>62393769
I've been directly promoted 3 times by being more competent and caring more than my coworker who was more senior. It's worked out well for me so far

62393785
>>62393664
MBA here, what we want is simple.
Don't be autistic.
If you are autistic, shut the fuck up, stop posting shit, stop emailing customers, and if an MBA tells you something then listen and learn. You have nothing to contribute except what you make, we don't need your life story or your gay ass futurama references.

62393791
>>62393778
Im the only person in my department who worked over 40 let alone the entire 40 a week and im about to get fired from a PIP cuz I dont have addiwuate communcation skills beacuse I somwtimes have typos on non crucial interoffice emails

62393794
>>62393777
> Okay now try having that screaming person be ur manager and not just a coworker.
Sounds fun, I would enjoy it. I got yelled at very loudly at work once and I burst out laughing hysterically and he got even angrier. Why aren’t you laughing? It is hilarious.

62393804
>>62393785
Do they teach u to grasp at straws in ur masters of bullshit degree? Of course u cant be autistic when emailing a client, let's not pretend this is about emailing clients though. If u dont want to manage autistic people then dont be an engineering manager. U MBA sure dont think those jeets u are trying(and failing) to replace us with are autistic, what does that say about u though?


Wait, let me guess, you, not u right? Cuz we all know, spacex builds their rockets using proper grammer...

Im reality, u are just jealous that we are smarter than u. Which is petty cuz that's the only thing we have on u since u make more and we weren't even trying to lord it over you. Yet u sit here and seeth and try to manipulate reality to make us look loke the bad guys. MBAs do absolutely nothing for the bottom line.

62393805
>>62393778
Did you go above and beyond? I meant working normally, because some people and most people in life are just so incompetent. The guys getting angry and irritated, they aren’t more productive or doing better, they are just more emotional and think they care more.

62393807
>>62393794
Bracusd this asshole can and probably will fire me and there are no fucking jobs out there right now and I didnt save enough money in my 20s cuz I thouvht I could just find a nice little job to work and work till I stroke out at work but I never realized just how toxic the MBA nazis can be. There is something wrong with them on a very visceral level

62393815
>>62393725
Wow do you live in third world or something? Sending time sensitive questions about patients to anyone who isn’t the assigned consult doctor is incredibly unprofessional, not to mention the other shit in your post. Go work at a better place?

62393821
corporations exist to make as much profit as possible from as few inputs as possible. that input is your salary. it doesn't matter where you work, there will always be waaaaaaay more work than people to do it. that''s just good business, it makes no sense to employ enough people to output 100% of the expected work when you can pay for 70% capacity and constantly stretch your employees to get near that 100% output.

t.management. its not that higher ups don't realize this its a simple input output question. it doesnt make any sense to spend say 500k to employ a couple more people to make 600k when instead you could not employ them, and just push your existing people to output an extra 200k. yeah there's 400k in lost profits but you came out ahead on your bottom line.

im pro owning at least one business but let's not pretend it's free money, its still a ton of work, just different work.

62393837
>>62393804
There's a reason that sales people make more than you autistic retards. You should be thankful that MBAs, project managers, and sales people exist. They're the only reason why you mentally ill freaks aren't in an asylum or writing open source software for free in your mommies basement. Now say "thank you Mr. MBA, for giving me the ability to earn enough money to have a roof over my head" and don't forget to tip your landlord.

62393859
>>62393821
Did u read what I said? Working 80 hours a week is no problem to me, i am a team player. I get absolutely nothing for it beacuse I get berated for fucking typos after working 12-16 hour over the weeknd

62393864
Whole lotta projection and larping in this thread

62393866
>>62393837
Thank you Mr MBA for teaching me that my output is usless and that all I have to do to get ahead is play ur stupid games that lose the comapny money. Here I am thinking I should be a loyal worker but you people showed me its all about appearances. As a matter of fact, the more shit u do the worse it is cuz u dont have enough time to focus on appearances.


Also were is that puc from, seems like a movie I would like.

62393939
>>62393785
OK go out of business shoe glue.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fEMPs_GhJ8U
@5:30

62393954
>>62393647
They exist anon, however you have to be exposed to those ones and then they have to want to have you (at any cost). This usually means you get to get fucked by a middleman contracting company that will have you do their work while scalping your pay. Worth it in the end, but you have to put in the time. Then you have to seek opportunities. I myself never cared about how much i made, as long as it was enough (minimalist) but I do value having the freedom to use that paid time to self-improve while benefitting the company. They have just seen a small project that will revolutionize the efficiency of their business and the best part is they wont have to pay some middleman to get it. All because I wanted to build something but needed data to play with. I get to self improve, save the company stupid amounts of money and resolve the headaches each department has. I never got a degree from college either, just followed what I was interested in. Good luck, thats how you were supposed to play the game but low IQ makes the awareness much harder to obtain.
>Reality is an IQ test

62393995
OP ans the doc ITT are being taken advantage of because they're kucks and obviously have never said "no" because they lack work/life experience and are scared of losing their jobs.
Just say "no" and treat your work like something you do for X hours a day and then just leave. Your aren't there to make friends so don't do anyone any favors.
It's that easy. You retarded kucks.

62394005
>>62393859
>Working 80 hours a week is no problem to me, i am a team
See, you are a total kuck LMAO
You'd rather work yourself to death rather than get 2 jobs to double your pay. Fucking autistic kuck.

62394030
>>62393821
This. If 5 can do it, then 4 can.

62394031
The caring about quality work is something that has to be grown out of fast if you’re in a corpo. But you only need to give vibes that your work is quality and you will be promoted. A lot of corporations would have their lunch eaten out if it weren’t for regulatory capture

62394084
>>62393647
Bro quiet quit and learn to talk over the heads of your incompetent managers to make them think you did valuable shit.

62395434
>>62393664
Kill yourself redditor.

62395440
>>62393647
Fuck em. Quiet quit, pick a good time for an irish goodbye (like wait for jan 1 and a pto reset, take it all up front) drop an upper decker on the way out, and blow a whistle to 3rd party compliance like 4 months later when they think thy got away with shit.

62395443
>>62393777
>ur
>cuz
Not surprised, your style is so fucking obnoxious.

item.title: What made you still hold BTC? — 96 replies — 48.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
What made you still hold BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 96 • Updated: 2026-06-22 07:38 UTC

OP

Bitcoin has gone through multiple cycles, crashes, and endless criticism, yet many continue to hold. What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

Early replies (first 3)

62371733
>>62371718
>What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

62371807
The only reason to ever sell bitcoin is to buy more at a lower price.

62371917
>>62371807
correct
>waiting for a good entry

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62384235
>>62372468
You better trade memecoins for that

62385618
>>62384235
Go for it. Nobody's stopping you, anon

62386979
>>62384208
Nobody knows

62387122
>>62384166
Do you think it will attract a lot of interest in the long run? The model looks good, and since it's self-custodial while expanding Bitcoin's use cases, I don't think it raises the usual concerns that many people have with DeFi.

62387125
>>62383619
Anon is relaxing

62387534
>>62387122
We'll know for sure once TBV launches on mainnet. That's when we'll see if it gains adoption and makes a real impact.

62387549
>>62383732
If you buy memecoins, not $btc

62387563
>>62387534
Defi is no longer valuable

62387566
Im fine

62387833
>>62387563
Depends what you mean by valuable. A lot of the hype is gone, but people are still borrowing, lending, and farming yield.

62387836
>>62387549
Doge coins lol

62387875
>>62371718
Because it's the only crypto asset I'd be comfortable holding for the next decade without constantly checking the chart.

62387892
the longer this market exists, the more Bitcoin seems to become the benchmark everything else gets compared against. So very very bullish

62388642
>>62387875
100%

62388704
>>62371718
Institutions are starting to make it into BTC, before bridge was the issue but with TBV eliminating that, more money will start flowing into BTC, it still feels early.

62388780
>>62376610
> printing is the only thing keeping the bubble from popping instantly. you want that?

62388819
>>62377444
> nothing has changed except the price chart and your cope levels

62388854
nothing, im not retarded so i take profits. my cost basis is negative now.

62389149
>>62388780
You know my answer for that

62389340
I feel like something new has to happen before the market shifts sentiment.

All the ETFs and government regulation just hurt the project.
Nobody is utilizing the tools, the tools still feel beta, and developers are being arrested.

If it's just going to be a big gay digital rock the momentum grinds to a halt.

The problem is some of us got rich and have something to lose now.
Different factions formed inside the developer community.
Is there incentive to free ball the network still? idk.

I'm still holding but this bear feels different

62390164
>>62388819
So how will you change it?

62391118
>>62389340
I'm still holding as well.

62391156
>>62371718
It feels like shit when it goes down but when you're near the bottom like now you just remember the last times you felt this way and how it gongo up from here, everytime. Bobos are ngmi. Mumu supremacy is real. Cope trannies.

62391165
>>62383619
Based retard

62391192
>>62371718
The 20% long-term-capital-gains tax rate that I'd have to pay if I cashed out all at once.

62391471
The only investments I hold are schizo nonsense Chainlink and PMs. I have a good amount of money through my Roth and 401k. I can only invest in specific etfs through my work 401k. What’s the best method to get long term Bitcoin exposure through a IRA?

62392524
>>62391156
You're not a real investor

62393205
>>62372380
Then how come I can send BTC to my Bitcoin core wallet dumbfuck?

62393451
>>62371718
I believe in the philosophy that led to bitcoin. Sadly the vast majority of humanity are just cattle. I still hold because I believe there is something that can happen. The pessimism on this board doesn't change my view on this. I will hold and if it fails I'll be ok because I have stocks and silver and land.

62395366
>>62391192
That's too much to be honest

item.title: >boss put me on a PIP 2 months ago >been trying to find jobs a few months before that cuz I realized there was no pleasi… — 107 replies — 31.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
>boss put me on a PIP 2 months ago >been trying to find jobs a few months before that cuz I realized there was no pleasi…

Open thread • Replies: 107 • Updated: 2026-06-22 06:14 UTC

OP

>boss put me on a PIP 2 months ago
>been trying to find jobs a few months before that cuz I realized there was no pleasing him
>haven't found any jobs, its unreal how bad the market is, have this bad feeling its never going to get better
>PIP ends on Tuesday
I am an engineer. I started off as a tech and worked my ass off getting bachelors full time to escape manual labor. Now im gonna be that goy with a masters degree who took a 500 percent pay cut to do repetitive ligament destroying work. I honestly feel like god did this beacuse its too much bad things happening at once that are culminating into my total demise.

Early replies (first 3)

62388691
>>62388676
>500 percent pay cut to do repetitive ligament destroying work
Trades pay more than ever, especially vs pajeet-saturated office work. Skill issue

62388694
>>62388676
My entire life has been nothing but fighting tooth and nail, working myself 1000x harder than anyone anywhere ever for 0.001% of what anyone else gets for free. I have felt that god is purposely shitting on me pretty much my whole life. It doesn't get better, it only ever gets worse. If anything happens to me that seem to be a good thing, I have 6 months max to enjoy it because that'll be taken from me and then I'll be beaten up and crushed down for added effect. It's a real comedy out there.

So don't worry bro, you have a lot of time ahead of you to suffer far more. If there really is a god, he must be the most perfectly evil of entities.

62388697
The worst part is that in my meeting with my boss today he didnt mention if I will pass the PIP. He said he needed to talk with some people including HR. So 90 percent chance he is going to fire me but just enough chance he wont that I have to spend the weekend waiting instead of processing the pain. And if he doesnt fire me, I will be a totally buckbroken employee who will never care about a rasie and work 60 hours weeks. Like a absurd housewife that has no were else to go and she tries to esapce and gets rapped(applies to ghost jobs) even worse so she comes back to him. Thats me. I used to think my relationship with work was like between a man and a woman, were I am the man that picks and chooses women and is the one who leaves but its all turned around past couple of years. I am nothing but a side pieace female whore to these companies now, they treat me like a contract worker without paying me like one. They got us with not giving raises to match inflation, they got us with return to work mandates and now, they are going to get us by firing us and leaving us with nothing. U will get put on a PIP too, at the worst time possible also. They wont even lay u off anymore, they want to save a little bit of money by denying us unemployment insurance by firing us through a PIP.


Was being in ur 30s a good excperince back in the day? There is no way human civilization would have gotten to were it is if it was always this bad for everyone. Of course, I am a faggot and just suck but the fsct of the matter is that PIPs and no jobs has been a very common trope on the internet lately

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62390264
>>62390249
Looks like someone struck a nerve.

62390415
>>62389206
Most people get made redundant, I´ve had/have some pretty incompetent colleagues and even those haven´t gotten fired yet.

62390437
>>62388850
> he's already on one. that's the problem.

62390473
>>62389236
> sitting at a desk is worse for your health than welding fumes and busted knees

cope harder, deskcel

62390520
>>62389236
You're a retard. Skilled or not, trades will fuck up your body through accidents, overuse injury, and just general wear and tear. It's not an accident that many in the trades cope with alcohol and drugs.
t. Former electrician now office monkey

62390565
>>62388697
>they treat me like a contract worker without paying me like one.
Holy FUCK that's what I've felt too.

Some people are allowed to stay solid and secure because of their personal connections and the rest of us get bait and switched during the interviews, squeezed of what they can get out of us for a while, then tossed out when the knowledge transfer is done or the project is good enough for them to hand it to one of their buddies and take it from you. You get worked like a slave and then cast out. Chewed up and spit out.

62390573
>>62388795
>Just make sure they fire you so you can get unemployment.
I thought it was if you get fired you don't get unemployment.
I someone tried pip'ing me too but I was protected by a higher up who realized that politics was fucking my shit up with a hostile environment so he mercy killed me with a layoff so I got a nice severance. After that I also got unemployment for my state.

62390675
>>62388691
>NAH MAN MY DAD'S BOYFRIEND'S STEP DOG'S COUSIN'S BROTHER IS AN ELECTRICIAN AND HE MAKES $370K A YEAR WORKS 3 MONTHS EVERY OTHER YEAR DOING UNDERWATER DATA CENTER CONSTRUCTION IN ALASKA NO DEBT BTFO COLLAGE FAGS

62391179
>>62389426
Mmm yes, go to the meat grinder goym

62391366
>>62390565
And then all these boomer managers judging me in interviews telling me ive been bouncing around all over the place, its awful

62391513
>>62390249
>she still thinks satanists are in it for the edge alone
>thinking fascism is edgy, an authoritarian imposition of traditional morals

62391843
>>62389431
I'd welcome you to try, sukdeep dikshit. I'll break every bone in your body if you come at me with a saw. Have you ever even operated a saw?

62391855
>>62388729
>>62388736
Retards, mostly 2nd anon.

You get off of backbreaking shit after jman(4-6 years) and specialize. Or sales, or foreman, or estimators, or inspectors, or maint.

Low IQ stay in back breaking

62391907
>>62390573
No, you get unemployment only if you are laid off due to economic constraints or incompetence. Thats why PIPs aren’t that bad. You don’t get unemployment if you are fired for negligence (this can be fought if you have proof they set you up or if they were playing favorites) or if you leave willingly. Unemployment benefits tend to pay up to 2000 dollars a month depending on your salary.
>t. Corporate wagie who dealt with it before

62392212
>>62391843
And who might you be? How about you learn to speak only when spoken to.

62392253
>>62388711
>ah yes did i tell you? all women around me have fancy jobs with big salaries and 100% remote positions and company trips all over the world
the new system is in place permanently and working as intended

62392282
>>62388711
>but i refuse to do it because my gf would earn more than me
Yeah, that’s a very good reason. Never let a girl out earn you.
>t. retired at 25

62392283
>>62392253
> >ah yes did i tell you? all women around me have fancy jobs with big salaries and 100% remote positions and company trips all over the world
Doesn’t bother me. Retired at 25. I know how damaging a 9-5 is and how even waking up at 7am is shitty and terrible for your healthy. Going to bed with an alarm is terrible too. No girl is out earning me. Trust me.

62393076
>>62388802
>I see a nig or a nog here and there
Kek

62393091
>>62388992
Kys

I'm in a very comfy sport right now but most of my life has been a shitshow ripe with suffering. I'll be "grateful" when I'm dead. Until then it's hate, hate, hate and a lot of grit

62393160
>>62388730
May everyone you love die of cancer before your eyes.

62393171
>>62388761
Kys

62393407
>>62388802
This post PROUDLY presented by a jeet.

62393484
>>62391855
Ye bro, let me just causally go from doing interesting work to hammering in nails to build more houses for the jeet and beaner invaders that the boomers are gonna rent out to

62393491
>>62391907
Wait wait wai. I've been tearing my hair out cuz I dont think I will get bennies beacuse i am on a PIP and ur telling me i can still get them? I called the unemployment office and they said 50/50 so idk man. Would be nice

62393565
>>62393091
This is something I have to come to terms with as I get older. My luck isnt the worst b u t the people in my life, especially my biological family has been making.my life hell and I need to cut ties with them once my grandma dies. All the bad things that happened to me in life could have been way easier to deal with without my family making it worse.

62393627
>>62392212
silly esl. you spoke to me and I spoke back. glad you adjusted your energy to match your grip strength, bitch.

62394155
>>62388676
Is that Matteo or Matthew?

62395199
>>62393091
You should be grateful. If not for your suffering, you wouldn't be a successful man. Forgive your mother for making you think life should be like you are a woman.

62395202
>>62393160
I'll still be grateful for what they gave me. Learn to stop acting like an entitled woman. Karen.

item.title: >1 br apartment >rent is significantly higher than mortgae payment for a 3 ned / 2 bath home with yard and 2 car garage… — 6 replies — 24.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>1 br apartment >rent is significantly higher than mortgae payment for a 3 ned / 2 bath home with yard and 2 car garage…

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-06-22 09:34 UTC

OP

>1 br apartment
>rent is significantly higher than mortgae payment for a 3 ned / 2 bath home with yard and 2 car garage
Can somebody explain why nobody is buying a home anymore? How is the 1 cuckroom apartment more appealing to people?
I see houses all over on the market for 120+ days. I think it's because 16 illegal Mexicans can't cram themselves into a single-family home and sustainenthe inflated prices like they do in the LA area.

Early replies (first 3)

62395257
Because the apartment is in the city centre 10 mins walk from work and the house is 90 minutes drive away

62395275
>>62395257
Except it isn't. I see them all over in places where having a car is mandatory. Still more expensive than getting a mortgage for a house a block away.

62395291
>>62395275
This question has been asked a billion times. I know the answer. You know the answer. (((They))) want you to rent a cuckbox forever. (((They))) tell you about how you don't even want a home anyway and how you're going to spend 200k a year on "repairs" or some stupid shit. $1500 mortgage? Don't even think about it. $1500 apartment? Right in your price range, goy. This is all while (((they))) buy up the real estate and prepare to rent it back to you. Forever. Buy a home while you still can, because in 10-20 years it will literally (not figuratively) be impossible. Probably illegal if you're not Blackrock. Don't say I didn't warn you.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62395295
>Breaking Bad House

>Only one bathroom

>Have to cross through the parents bed room to go to toilet

American housing planning is retarded

62395398
>>62395295
wtf i thought i was in /tv/

62395512
>>62395241
This is basically what I did. Went from a 1500 per month rent on a studio to a 1400 per month mortgage on a 3 bedroom, pretty cozy. Cheaper and I keep half of it in equity instead of burning every payment.

item.title: >he went all in on everything except the only investment that matters Why didn't YOU invest in your family? — 47 replies — 12.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
>he went all in on everything except the only investment that matters Why didn't YOU invest in your family?

Open thread • Replies: 47 • Updated: 2026-06-22 05:47 UTC

OP

>he went all in on everything except the only investment that matters

Why didn't YOU invest in your family?

Early replies (first 3)

62379163
you're asking why I didn't invest in my family...

and I will ask in return...

Is killing niggers free and open-source?

62379166
I personally view having kids an essential life goal.
Just give me more time.

62379173
>>62379160
I'm 29 with $300k I'm gonna get my gf pregnant at 30. Hopefully I'll have 400k by the

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62387680
What family?

62389092
>>62379160
Anon... you didn't have to TRVKE me like this...

62389110
>>62379160
I tried so many times. Females aren't right these days, I tell you wHat.
t. literal white haired Anon

62389116
>>62389110
Imagine going to the frail white shrink before running to the huge cock bull. You make no sense. Scared.

62389121
>>62379160
Went bald. Lost confidence. Dating is no longer viable.

62389122
>>62389116
Oy vey
I was just making a joke, goyim.
Remain relaxed

62389393
>>62379160
you think you're going to get a huge titted wife with beautiful kids, but the reality is more like "Married...With Children", if you are lucky. ending up divorce raped if average.

62389506
I think I found the one to start a family with. Last year was rough though, her dad had just retired then got diagnosed with pancreatic cancer and went downhill quick. Really put things into perspective. I hope none of you or your loved ones have to go through that.

62389513
I genuinely believe the world's going to get real fucked up and I would basically be breeding people into hell so I want to refrain from children

62389520
>>62389513
People felt this way 10 years ago. Nothing ever happens

62389537
>>62389520
uhhhh nah gng its already fucked and getting worse not even blackpilling. wait til fed hikes rates to 7% next year

62389572
Am I the only one who feels like I could never trust or care about a woman enough to marry them? I've dated a few girls and could never imagine signing my life and financial freedom away. It's just not worth it.

62389585
>>62389572
nah if you get married young (early 20s max) and find a soulmate to start a family together it can work and you can be happy esp if you grew up with your sig other. But other than that its a trap. I literally had dozens of gfs in LTRs and hundreds of ONS's but I waited too long to get married to someone i really didnt even fcking know "bc thats why" (meme) and it was a fucking nightmare but the good part was i escaped quick asf and will never even consider marriage again.

62389596
>>62389572
I feel the same way.

62389600
Im 29 with only 60k... im importing a pajeeta wife to incubate but my seed but im going to leave it for a few years to build bigger port and maybe coastfire. How much should an anon have before producing spawn?

62389606
sexing bobina with my big brahmin penos

62389617
40 with $1.6M net worth all in equities here. I want to become a father but I’m finding dating a slog despite serious effort. Decent probability that I will end up single despite my best effort.

62389633
>>62389617
becoming a father at 40 is fucking horrible for u and the children unless u adopt bc that kid is already living in hell or soon will be so anything is an upgrade

62389692
>>62379259
Nah, your ovaries are all shriveled up and old

62391160
I tried getting on dating apps but got zero attention from women. I felt bad at first but then I felt relieved. If I'm invisible to women I don't have to feel regret about not having a family.

62391206
>>62379259
> It's not too late r-right?

It depends I know I guy that was 42 and married and had kids with a 25 year old but he got rich off legal marijuana business and he is mentally very young due to low iq and is extremely extroverted and charismatic so pretty much all the qualities that would allow from him to get a young hot girl and such an old age

62391228
>>62379160
I kept thinking I could do better so put off dating, but am now a 30 year old boomer and balding. I'm priced out of this investment.

62391342
>>62379160
No irl Bobina :( why bother when I can't have this, she's literally my #1 waifu. I hope I at least get rich and thereby get a comfy easy life.

62391389
>>62379160
Women are extremely vapid and needy. Not to mention hostile to most hobbies that guys favor.
I would know since i grew up with sisters and girl cousins.
I don't even have enough time for myself. I just can not imagine giving away half or more of my already limited time on this planet to somebody else like that.

I'm undiagnosed, but probably on some part of the spectrum that messes with whatever part of the brain is supposed to put value on female contact and procreation.
Don't get me wrong, i'm attracted to women sexually, but actually dedicating my life to one? It just seems like an extremely bad deal all around. Basically feels like suicide with extra steps.

62391394
Im not afraid of big asses. Im just lazy you have to come to me. You try carrying the massive penis weight through walk ways

62392077
>>62379160
I was an unlikeable sub5 poorfat for most of my life. 35 now with a job and slowly losing weight, but the damage is done. It will likely never happen, so I'm just stacking funds so I can at least have a peaceful retirement.

62395096
>>62379160
I'm 29, fat, have almost no money, no degree, no social skilIs, and I work manual labor at wage cage. At this point, I think I've missed out on gaining a family. It's hard but I've been starting to come to terms with it. I don't even really care for socializing anymore and as a kid/teen I was always bullied whenever I tried to socialize. I just started my wagie job and it's a pretty active one where I constantly move a lot, so I'm hoping to lose weight through it. I'm also putting money into XMR and I'm heading back to college in August. I'm going to try to get a degree in EECS and minor in Nip-speak. Hoping I'm done by my mid-30s. Not having friends does help me stay focused on at least achieving those goals, so it's not completely bad. There's more to life than having a family anyway and personally, if I die alone so be it. As long as I get to accomplish my dream job, then I'll be content. I know a lot of my fellow old anons are dealing with this sad realization too but sometimes it's better to appreciate what little we do have. I just want to live in nipland and be a gamedev. I don't care what anyone else says or thinks.

62395110
>>62395096
ygmi anon i believe in you

62395163
>>62395096
It’s funny how many complete weirdos post here who act online like they’re completely normal. Like 1 out of 30 kids, the one who was the most weird. T. Always had friends

62395165
>>62395163
And i mean people call me autistic sometimes.

item.title: >govt collects tax >its not enough >issues bonds providing interest for money >needs more money next year >tax isnt enou… — 37 replies — 9.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
>govt collects tax >its not enough >issues bonds providing interest for money >needs more money next year >tax isnt enou…

Open thread • Replies: 37 • Updated: 2026-06-22 05:51 UTC

OP

>govt collects tax
>its not enough
>issues bonds providing interest for money
>needs more money next year
>tax isnt enough
>issues bonds providing interest for money
>did this so many times now need debt to pay back debt

why not just NOT spend like a high end escort?

Early replies (first 3)

62379039
>>62379035
OP is a bulgarian faggot who spams this board and scams people.

62379041
>>62379039
im black and i dont spam this board

62379042
>>62379035
>why not just NOT spend like a high end escort?
the austerity necessary to balance the budget would cause an armed revolt.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62379101
money exists to be spent. if you don't spend, there are no jobs, there is no development, there are no goods and services. the purpose of an economy is to produce things, not to hoard money. we can already see that the "free market", left to its own devices, prefers to hoard rather than spend, and uses hoarded resources to oppress and stifle growth rather than encourage it

62379304
>>62379044
Hmm those corporate taxes seem kinda low

62380467
>>62379035
Until jfk, we didn't have a deficit (he was the first one to cut taxes for economic growth). Even then, it took until Reagan for tax cuts to turn into a massive problem, with him basically halving them and double national debt in his time. Trump did the same thing (rich nigga tax cuts) and it tripled national debt, then that problem doubled under biden. The government has been collecting more of your taxes and less taxes of the people who actually have money to foot the bill. This shit is what caused the french revolution; king louis said, "we're broke dead fucking poor. Nobles, foot the bill". The Nobles said, "BITCH I'D RATHER DIE" and then they did.

We're already stripped every neccesary and not neccesary government organization and service to the bone. We can't even have free-tax filing; the problem isn't cost, it's revenue.

62384846
>>62379035
The money printer is the opiate of the state. The planet is addicted to the Rothschild smack.

62385524
>>62379304
>taxes
>too low
Go glow somewhere else
Instead how about we stop giving all our fucking money away in foreign aids and dem programs while removing all income taxation

62386402
>>62385524
We can have social services AND have lower taxes for the average person. Just put back corporate tax rates back to what they were during the boomer's time and simplify the tax code.

62386422
>>62385524
Foreign aid is basically nothing. The biggest expenditures are Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, and VA benefits. Basically everything else is a rounding error.

62388264
>>62386402
>just increase taxes
No, they're already beyond exorbitant
We don't need all these social services just to import the difference and make everybody worse off
>>62386422
>basically nothing
Good, then it won't be missed when it gets cut
>social security
>medicare
>medicaid
Can all be cut as well. We don't need these funds simply to be "borrowed against" to collateralize even more bullshit the government doesn't need to be involved in.
>inb4 oh noes what about the nigger riots!?
Arrested and put to work. 2 for 1
>va benefits
Are just about the only legit thing there, since its upholding the bargain of a citizen giving their life and livelihood to the state for a time in return for perks later in life
I long for the day the state has outward facing teeth instead of inward again

62388492
>>62388264
Do you want a functional society, or is sucking billionaire dick JUST THAT NOURISHING for you? Social services are what separates first-world countries from 3rd world countries. If you want to be live like you live in guam, move to guam. I want to live like I'm european, why don't you?

62388495
>>62379035
because it's easy to spend other people's money. also people get elected by promising to give people free shit. there's no long term thinking or accountability after that.

62388514
>>62388492
>wanting less intrusive bullshit and welfare queens is LITERALLY SUCKING BILLIONAIRE DICK
I hate the tier of disingenuous bullshit the dialog has sunk to on the modern internet
I said what I said and didn't say what your tiktok rotted brain thinks I said
I don't want to live like impoverished, overtaxed euros. I want to live unfettered on my land and tell the government to kindly go fuck itself until I want their involvement, like an American
And you can go live in europe if you think its so much better. Funny how free association works, yeah?

62388519
>>62379044
>Retarded infographic designed by retarded overpaid infodesigner that communicates fuckall except OOHHH PRETTY SHAPES AND COLORS!!
Its over

62388527
>>62388264
you reek of low IQ

62388541
>>62388514
Trust me, I'm trying every day to move. You don't have to worry about me. Either way, yuo said retarded bullshit, and I told you its logical conclusion. Just because you say dumb things and expect other people to take your mistruths as face value doesn't mean I'm going to do the same. It's not the euros struggling to afford to get to work. It's not the euros being bankrupt from a single broken leg. It's not the euros who work more, eat worse, have their kids stuck inside the home in suburbia. It's not the euros paying private companies to pay their own fucking taxes. So you calling THEM impoverished caps your iq at 90, sorry to tell you.
You wanna tell the govt to go fuck itself, but you won't tell the corps? Power is going to centralize somehow, and you can either have some input on that, or let someone not at all beholden to you get the reins. If you want unregulated corps using wood chips to add weight to bread and chip bags or continue to put ethanol in gasoline, do nothing for the latter and wait 10 years for the former.

62388611
>>62388527
>if you disagree with endless money printing, gibs, and importation of incompatible cultures you must be stupid
Wow, what a brilliant and original retort
You may as well have resorted to saarposting
>>62388541
>if you disagree with endless money printing, gibs, and importation of incompatible cultures you must be stupid, long version
Its all so tiresome
I'm not reading all that commie bullshit
Leave and don't let the door hit your fat lazy ass on the way out

62388828
>>62388611
I didn't even talk about immigration wtf?
yfw:

62388844
>>62379035
Enough is an illusion. All want is more

62388858
>>62379035
That's what inevitably happens when you have a monopoly on violence called the state.
You are now in the decline phase of the ponzi scheme, also called end stage statism.
Enjoy slavery :D

62389076
>>62379046
>the dollar system was politicized
qrd?

62389082
>>62380467
If the USA spent nothing for a year or two we could pay back the debt (not that this is remotely feasible). Personally, I like the idea of a sovereign wealth fund intended explicitly for paying the debt back, not sure why Trump axed it when his admin proposed it.

62389166
>>62388264
>No, they're already beyond exorbitant
Are major American companies actually going to pack their bags and leave to another country if gubment starts giving them serious taxes? Playing devil's advocate here, but if the entire world goes to shit, it takes something special for America to outdo the rest of the world due to reserve currency status. Besides, corporations purposefully underpay and expect you to figure out the rest, with retail expecting you to supplement your income with welfare. The welfare state has been a disaster for the poor and the corporations, both create market distortions due to ease of spending and club exclusivity. I'm "middle class," but you better believe if I got the same healthcare and food stamps like the corporations/poor, I would have extra money for saving/consumption.

62389187
>>62379101
Investments aren't hoarding, genius

62389192
>>62388541
>I'm trying every day to move
Failing at that like you fail at everything real, eh?

62389197
>>62388858
I stole this pepe :D

62389302
>>62389166
>corporations purposefully underpay
Don't disagree at all
>welfare, corpo and otherwise have been an unmitigated disaster
Also agree completely. The tax and welfare schema has effectively made certain bad companies always end up on top, with executives believing themselves to be geniuses that need an order of magnitude higher compensation than deserved.
But you don't just away the problem when that tax money is just fueled right back to the source of the issue. The taxes need to go away so the fuel for corruption simply has less gas in the tank. Then the unnecessary subsidies start falling away, and their cancerous ancillary apparatus. This kind of market wide reorganization would 100% be sold as a crash, and a lot of make work bullshit industries would be culled, but its either that or we follow the hyperinflation train to the end of the line.

As part of the weaning process, I'd suggest pinning more favorable tax rates to companies that employ
>*only* natural born citizens
and/or
>*only* use domestically produced materials (I.e. feedstocks or components)
The second one would be tough to meet the mark in certain markets, but that's incentive to start carving those niches out yourself as an entrepreneur

62389548
>>62379101
>economy
You mean subtle but forced slavery for goycattle

62389569
>>62388519
If you can't understand it that's fine m8. I thought the third grade was tough too.

62390178
>>62388514
>>62388611
Because americans do not import millions of smelly browns, you fucking kek.

62392337
>>62388541
imagine aspiring to be a europoor lmao

62395170
>>62388264
troll. Obvious logical errors.

item.title: Why does the stock market have to close on weekends? — 6 replies — 6.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why does the stock market have to close on weekends?

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-06-22 08:41 UTC

OP

Why does the stock market have to close on weekends? Shops don't. Surely one or two people could keep it open so I can buy SPCX now instead of waiting 'til Monday?

Early replies (first 3)

62391661
>>62391660
degenerate gambler

62391719
Hurts so bad bros

62391764
>>62391660

But they do in Germany.

>>62391764
what if you are starving?

62395439

PLS BUY MY BAGS NAO!!!!

item.title: When is the fucking Ass&Piss500 crashing so I can get slurpies? — 12 replies — 2.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
When is the fucking Ass&Piss500 crashing so I can get slurpies?

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-06-22 04:05 UTC

OP

When is the fucking Ass&Piss500 crashing so I can get slurpies?
BOJ already hiked to 1% interest this week and I was hoping that certain stocks in the Nikkei225 would sink, BUT THEY CLIMBED HIGHER! Then I thought the carry trade Yen/Usd would fuck up the Ass&Piss, also hoping for America to increase interest rate, BUT ITS STILL FUCKING CLIMBING.
Even with the Hormuz straight ITS STILL FUCKING CLIMBING.
REACHING ALL TIME HIGHS.

How? This makes no sense!

Early replies (first 3)

62387100
>>62387085
At this point im demoralized enough by clown markets and clown world to just yolo in. Ive been liquid for 6 months. Bout to give up

62387103
At this point im demoralized enough by clown markets and clown world to just yolo in. Ive been liquid for 6 months. Bout to give up

62387112
>>62387085
the best strategy, in a rigged clown market, is to simply layer in across time instead of across events. you will always be waiting for the big one to hit with a pile of cash sidelined, while the government does literally everything in its power to ensure retirement line goes up. they will fail of course, as they always do, but you will not succeed in timing it perfectly. if you buy across time you can ensure you have at least some capital allocated in the dips, instead of none at all, waiting for a megadip to come when a superdip only ever comes.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62387201
>>62387085
>When is the fucking Ass&Piss500 crashing
it already did bro
you didn't buy?

62387217
hoLY SHIT .25% RATE INCRASE SToP ALL INVESTENT STOP BUYNG SELL EVERYTHING IGNORE AI IGNORE AI IGNORE ROBOTICS 25 BASISPOINTS DONTCHAKNOW

62387219
holy SHIT IGNORE THE STEAM ENGINE THE LORD IS LEVYING .25% MORE GRAIN

LOST DECADE INCOMINIG

62389181
JUST TWO MORE WEEKS

62390152
>>62389181
Mi a wait fi a stock crash fi so long. Mi waan see di Nikkei225 an KOSPI crash. Deh deh some nice stocks mi need fi slurp.

62392612
>>62387085
>Ass&Piss500
instead of Shit&Piss500
you are dumb

62394966
>>62387085
mid October. be ready

62394974
if everyone in the world wants to slurp (you included), then why would it go down

62394975
>>62387085
Just DCA. I’m doing 1k/wk. I need to offload 30k cash.

Psychologically I wouldn’t be able to tolerate lump summing right before a crash so this is better than “nothing”

item.title: If you’ve held Chainlink for years, ask yourself what you’ve been waiting for. — 79 replies — 61.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
If you’ve held Chainlink for years, ask yourself what you’ve been waiting for.

Open thread • Replies: 79 • Updated: 2026-06-22 08:20 UTC

OP

If you’ve held Chainlink for years, ask yourself what you’ve been waiting for.

LINK is a $5.7B token on $57.5M of annual fees. That’s ~99x revenue, and it has been flat for years, straight through every “banks are coming” cycle. The promise was always that adoption converts into value. It hasn’t. It’s been “soon” since 2020.

So here’s the question no diehard wants to answer:

What fee number, by what date, would make you sell? If LINK still earns ~$57M in 2028, is the thesis wrong, or is it still “soon”? If you can’t name the number and the date, you’re not investing in Chainlink. You’re believing in it. And belief has no exit.

Early replies (first 3)

62382825
never. Its not about the link token, its just about the hope for the future it gives. That is what keeps me going, even if its a delusion. Thus I will never sell, because as long as I hold the token that fantastical delusion can still be real in my mind

62382842
chatgpt post

62382990
>>62382842
OP is a mentally ill faggot

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62390369
>>62388326
I'm happy to report I already overperformed LINK.

62390373
i already sold a third this year and moved it to semis, outperformed the other two thirds massively. feels good to see big green numbers again

62390387
>>62382813
When all supply is released and the team is fully divested of the token it will see massive value accrual.

62391603
>>62382813
waiting for the market to catch up

62393512
Chainlink lets financial data be private with blockchain

62393539
>>62387994
Angry? Maybe, But is he wrong?

62393554
Since no one else will tell you the truth, the only reason anyone is still holding on is the firm gut feeling that it will moon the moment they sell. For them, the line between "vaporware scam" and "late-blooming success" is whether or not they, personally, are holding it. Schrödinger's coin.

62393559
>>62391603
its 2026, we cant break $10, and we are coping with virtual participation trophies. its so fucking over

62393898
all references to staking v1.0 was removed from their website and all tweets by sergey, chris barret and Chainlink itself referencing were just deleted

62393938
>>62393898
Interesting. So I'm a certified retard and you seem to know what you're talking about so let me ask you this:
If chainlink is decentralized why does no one actually run a node here? Especially since people say they're "subsidized", it seems like it'd be free money, so why don't they do it?
If you can't actually run a node meaning it's not really decentralized, why would anyone buy this dumb token in the first place? Why wouldn't they invest in the company itself if they actually believe in the team?
This whole setup seems bizarre to me, almost like it was designed to hoodwink a bunch of midwits and retards who don't know that business to business API service providers have existed for like 50 years now and none of them have required some stupid fake token to make the service possible.

62394006
>>62393938
i still have a lot of link, but i'm probably going to sell the rest this year. what you said is part of the reason, the other is that even if you could run a node, none of the people here have the expertise to do so, yet they claim to understand why chainlink is valuable. really makes you think

62394021
Fuddies still at it

Im just not gonna sell

62394351
>>62393898
we're really about to lose everything aren't we

62394544
>>62393898
Fucking hell, please tell me this isn't true. Should have sold off this shit in late 2024/early 2025.

62394589
>>62383299
You have a rot pocket open flesh wound, you will never be a woman. Kill yourself troon filth

62394741
>>62393938
Staking v0.2 exists and secures the network but its limited to 45m link tokens

Increasing the pool size wouldn't really "increase security" because it's massively diminishing returns and it's currently as secure as it will ever need to be.

Increasing pool size just means the people currently staking (Chainlink labs and s few others who got lucky) will have their yield/returns cut massively

You can't invest in the company because it's not public, and they don't need investors when they unlock 18 million link every quarter to fund their operations

62394746
>>62393898
This is the factual end of chainlink
>>62394741
This is jeetcope

62394749
>>62393938
Also worth mentioning the whole reason they're able/allowed to leave link holders in the shit is because it was deemed not a security.

Everyone slaughtered gensler for trying to come after these crypto companies saying they were securities and the crypto companies convinced token holders that TOKEN BEING A SECURITY IS BAD

But the only thing "bad" about it was that the companies would be given a responsibility to protect investors interests.

By not being a security, it allowed companies like Chainlink to do this, basically wave Goodbye without even an apology

62394943
>>62394741
Here's the part I don't get. What does it "secure" the network from? Don't the nodes have to put up their own shit? The pool itself seems like people just locking up their own mickey mouse tokens in exchange for more mickey mouse tokens at a rate that doesn't even beat short term treasury bills when you factor in the price dumping all the time.

62394949
>>62394749
This is pretty misleading. Being a security would make it way harder to actually gain adoption, also would likely lead to mass delisting and exclusion from current ETFs and bundled assets. Commodities are also regulated, btw, and afford protections against fraud, market manipulation, insider trading amongst other things, though you do not get the same investor style regular reporting as a security would get (which for sure would be nice from CLL). Saying they can "wave goodbye without an apology" is 100% false, though.

62394950
>>62394943
>What does it "secure" the network from
absolutely nothing. the current staking mechanism's sole purpose is to guarantee the uptime of nodes. if they fail to report for an hour then they get slashed. but it's not collateral that gets slashed, but rather any accumulated rewards that haven't been claimed by the node.

62395264
>>62393898
>all references to staking v1.0 was removed from their website and all tweets by sergey
What the fuck do you mean?
All tweets on staking from Sergey and Chainlink are all still up, and whitepaper 2.0 is still on the website as "the" whitepaper.
I don't think anyone at Chainlink ever referred to staking as "staking 1.0", if that's what you're thinking.

>>62390387
I can't think of a single crypto that already has all of its supply released. You're a moron.

62395302
>>62395264
>damage control

62395331
>>62393554
>the line between "vaporware scam" and "late-blooming success" is whether or not they, personally, are holding it.
heh

62395341
>>62395338

62395364
>>62395302
>fuddie with a shiny new ID

>>62395338
>>62395341
she wasn't even working for Chainlink when she made these

62395375
>>62395364
>she wasn't even working for Chainlink when she made these
lol cope she was forced by chainlink to remove them :D

62395377
>>62383267
>>62383275
>>62383287
>>62388131
>>62395264
paid link shill

62395422
>>62395375
Those tiktoks were from before summer 2021, when she worked at other companies.
And even if that were from her Chainlink days, there's nothing about them that reflects poorly on her work.

>>62395377
Either that or I'm just a holder.

It's pretty insane how much you care about Chainlink though.
